mapper.select: SELECT ua.id, ua.user_code, ua.auth_identifier, ua.auth_status, ua.auth_type, u.username, u.nickname, u.phone, u.avatar, u.user_status, uap.password, uap.salt, uap.last_changed_time FROM iam_user_auth ua INNER JOIN iam_user u ON u.user_code = ua.user_code INNER JOIN iam_user_auth_password uap ON uap.user_code = ua.user_code WHERE ua.deleted = 0 AND u.deleted = 0 AND uap.deleted = 0 AND ua.auth_type = 'PASSWORD' AND ua.auth_identifier = #{username} AND u.user_status = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE iam_user_auth SET last_login_time = NOW(), last_login_ip = #{lastLoginIp}, login_count = login_count + 1, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE iam_user_auth SET last_login_time = NOW(), last_login_ip = #{lastLoginIp}, login_count = login_count + 1, version = version + 1 WHERE user_code = #{userCode}
mapper.select: SELECT user_code, nickname FROM iam_user WHERE deleted = 0 AND user_code IN ( #{item} )
SELECT id, user_code, password, salt, last_changed_time, version FROM iam_user_auth_password WHERE deleted = 0 AND user_code = #{userCode}
SELECT id, user_code, password, salt, create_time FROM iam_user_password_his WHERE deleted = 0 AND user_code = #{userCode} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE iam_user_auth_password SET password = #{password}, salt = #{salt}, last_changed_time = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE deleted = 0 AND user_code = #{userCode} AND version = #{version}
